weekSummary: Transitioning to structured Zone 2 cardio. Lower body rehab progressing well with increased range of motion.
tip: Keep heart rate below 145 bpm during cardio sessions. Monitor knee response after each session.

weekSummary: First week back on the bike trainer. Strength sessions increasing in intensity. Recovery metrics trending positive.
tip: Start with 20-minute sessions on the trainer and increase by 5 minutes each session if pain-free.

weekSummary: Upper body strength maintained. Introducing bodyweight squats and lunges with physical therapist supervision.
tip: Perform exercises in front of a mirror to ensure proper form and alignment.

weekSummary: Cleared for weight-bearing exercises. Starting with resistance bands and progressing to light weights.
tip: Increase resistance gradually. Stop immediately if sharp pain returns.

weekSummary: Consistency is key, with a strong foundation being built.
tip: Prioritize gentle stretching and foam rolling after high-intensity sessions to maintain recovery rate.

weekSummary: Focused on active recovery and maintaining mobility. No high impact.
tip: Ice and elevation after physical therapy sessions.

weekSummary: Transitioning from complete rest to light mobility work.
tip: Listen to pain signals. Do not push through sharp pain.

weekSummary: Complete rest protocol initiated. Monitoring inflammation levels.
tip: Sleep is the primary recovery tool this week.
